name: Fodda Knowledge Graphs MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing expert-curated knowledge graphs for AI agents — covering PSFK Retail, Beauty, Sports, and other industry verticals. Enables AI agents to query structured knowledge graph data about industry trends, innovations, and expert insights curated from PSFK research.
use_cases: Querying retail and consumer industry knowledge graphs for market research agents
Retrieving curated sports and beauty industry trends from intelligence agents
Building industry-specific research workflows backed by expert PSFK knowledge
Grounding AI responses with structured industry knowledge for consulting agents
not_for: Real-time news or live market data (curated research focus)
Industries not covered by PSFK knowledge domains
Academic or scientific research requiring peer-reviewed sources
best_when: A retail, beauty, or sports industry professional wants AI agents to access curated industry knowledge — trends, innovations, and expert insights from PSFK research — without having to manually search through reports.
avoid_when: You need raw primary research data or real-time market information. Fodda's knowledge graphs are curated and editorially selected, not exhaustive.

auth.notes: Fodda API key required. Knowledge graph data is proprietary — commercial use terms apply.

pricing.paid_tiers: Unknown — PSFK research is premium content
pricing.notes: PSFK research is a paid research service. Access to knowledge graphs likely requires subscription.

known_agent_gotchas: Knowledge graph coverage limited to PSFK verticals — not a general-purpose knowledge base
Proprietary data — commercial use restrictions from PSFK licensing
Knowledge freshness varies — curated research may lag current market developments
Emerging MCP service — validate knowledge quality for your specific use case
Graph structure and query capabilities may evolve as service matures
agent_readiness.security_notes: Proprietary PSFK research data. Commercial licensing applies. API key protection required. Generally low-security-risk research content.

security_score_components.security_notes: Proprietary research data with licensing restrictions. API key required. Generally low-sensitivity content. HTTPS.
